news.headline: 30-year mortgage rates plummet to 6.47%, recording the largest weekly drop this year, hitting a 15-month low.
news.summary: The primary mortgage rate experienced its most significant weekly drop of the year, reaching its lowest point in 15 months.

news.headline: X, owned by Elon Musk, halts data collection for AI training following EU watchdog’s request, impacting EU user data.
news.summary: Following legal proceedings in an Irish court, the Data Protection Commission announced that X has agreed to halt the processing of personal data belonging to European Union users for the purpose of training its artificial intelligence system.

news.headline: Fulcrum IT Partners buys Fortress Security Risk Management, a $1 billion sales company to enhance cybersecurity offerings.
news.summary: Toronto-based IT solutions provider Fulcrum IT Partners has revealed plans to acquire Fortress SRM, a division of MCPC known for its cybersecurity solutions. With annual sales exceeding $1 billion, Fulcrum aims to enhance its cybersecurity portfolio with this acquisition. Headquartered in Ohio, Fortress SRM is recognized as a top security provider by CRN and offers comprehensive cybersecurity services. The move is set to bolster Fulcrum's capabilities in this sector and expand its market presence.

news.headline: Bread Financial repurchases $237.6M of its 4.25% Convertible Senior Notes due 2028 for $350M cash through privately negotiated agreements.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio on August 09, 2024, Bread Financial Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: BFH) announced private repurchase agreements with select holders of its 4.25% Convertible Senior Notes due 2028. The agreements entail the repurchasing of $237.6 million aggregate principal amount of the Notes for about $350.0 million in cash. The final cash repurchase price is adjustable and dependent upon the daily volume-weighted average price per share of the company’s common stock during a designated period starting August 9, 2024.

news.headline: White House Energy Adviser Hochstein: We will continue to replenish strategic oil reserves.
Create meme coins for free with Pump.fun, and make money from successful coins. Join now!
news.summary: In recent news, a popular meme coin platform has announced a new update that allows users to create coins for free. Additionally, creators will now be rewarded for generating successful meme coins on the platform. This update is set to revolutionize the meme coin creation process, offering users a chance to earn rewards while generating new coins.

news.headline: Former US president calls for control over Federal Reserve's rate policy if re-elected.
news.summary: The ex-president has strongly expressed his desire to have control over the central bank's interest rate policy if he secures re-election.

news.headline: MangoRx migrates to DEA-approved telemedicine platform, improving services. Focus on men’s health; offers various treatments.
news.summary: In Dallas, Texas, on August 9, 2024, Mangoceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: MGRX), specializing in men’s health and wellness products for areas like erectile dysfunction, hair growth, weight loss, and hormone replacement therapies, revealed the completion of its transition to a new DEA-approved telemedicine platform. This enhancement symbolizes a major progress for MangoRx, showcasing dedication to innovation and top-notch patient services.

news.headline: International Tower Hill Mines Ltd. announced filing of 2024 Q2 financial results; traded on TSX: ITH and NYSE American: THM.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on August 9, 2024, International Tower Hill Mines Ltd. (TSX: ITH) (NYSE American: THM) disclosed the submission of its unaudited financial statements for the second quarter. The company submitted its Management Discussion and Analysis along with the Quarterly Report.

news.headline: KB Home opens Graham Springs community in North Carolina. Features modern homes with up to 5 bedrooms and 3 baths.
news.summary: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has unveiled Graham Springs, a fresh housing development in Graham, NC, catering to modern living needs. The community offers homes with contemporary kitchens opening to spacious great rooms and generous bedroom suites boasting walk-in closets. The diverse floor plans include one- and two-story layouts with up to five bedrooms and three baths. KB Home's distinguishing factor lies in its commitment to fostering close, individual connections with clients.

news.headline: BrightSpire Capital priced $675 million BRSP 2024-FL2 Commercial Real Estate CLO and to redeem CLNC 2019-FL1.
news.summary: BrightSpire Capital, Inc. revealed that they have priced BRSP 2024-FL2, a $675 million managed Commercial Real Estate Collateralized Loan Obligation (2024-FL2 CLO) on August 1, 2024. The transaction is set to be finalized on August 15, 2024. The 2024-FL2 CLO comprises interests in 22 first-lien floating-rate mortgages backed by 25 properties, featuring an 86.50% initial advance rate.

news.headline: KB Home opens new community Cielo within Villa Ticino master plan in Manteca, CA, offering homes with up to 6 bedrooms and 4 baths.
news.summary: MANTECA, Calif.--KB Home recently marked the grand opening of its latest community, Cielo, located in the sought-after Villa Ticino master plan in Manteca, California. The new homes at Cielo at Villa Ticino are tailored to contemporary lifestyles and boast sought-after features including modern kitchens that open to spacious great rooms, bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage space. The residence options include one- and two-story floor plans featuring up to six bedrooms and four bathrooms.

news.headline: Home Depot (NYSE:HD) to report Q2 earnings at $4.50/share on $43.37 billion revenue. Dividend yield at 2.59%. Market Perform rating with $360 PT.
news.summary: The Home Depot, Inc. (NYSE: HD) will announce its second-quarter earnings on August 13. Analysts predict earnings to be $4.50 per share, a decrease from $4.65 per share last year. Revenue for the quarter is estimated to be $43.37 billion. Telsey Advisory Group's analyst maintained a Market Perform rating with a price target of $360 on August 7. Home Depot's current annual dividend yield is 2.59%. Some investors are considering potential gains from dividends. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Nigerian activist fights for Bitcoin rights in a key legal case, with potential impact on cryptocurrency in the country.
news.summary: The result of this legal proceeding could have a major impact on the development of cryptocurrencies in Nigeria.

news.headline: Thailand introduces sandbox to trial crypto services. In 2024, it okayed a Bitcoin ETF and tax benefits for crypto.
news.summary: In 2024, Thailand has been increasingly supportive of cryptocurrencies, with notable developments including the approval of a Bitcoin Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) and the introduction of tax incentives for the crypto industry. These moves signal a more favorable regulatory environment for digital assets in the country.

news.headline: Chang Robotics introduces GOEco, using compostable graphene oxide to replace harmful chemicals in packaging.
news.summary: Cutting-edge technology has been developed that utilizes low levels of compostable graphene oxide to create a protective barrier against oils and moisture in various items such as food packaging, paper plates, straws, cups, and utensils. This innovative solution, introduced in Evanston, Illinois on August 9, 2024, addresses concerns related to the contamination and dangers posed by microplastic particles and PFAs. This breakthrough offers a sustainable and efficient approach to enhancing the safety and integrity of everyday products.

news.headline: Dubai introduces program to empower future foresight leaders globally.
news.summary: Dubai has unveiled a new initiative aimed at empowering future foresight leaders on a global scale. The program is designed to equip individuals with the necessary skills and knowledge to navigate the challenges of tomorrow. This initiative marks a significant step towards preparing leaders for the uncertainties of the future.

news.headline: Paymentus Holdings will be at Oppenheimer Virtual Technology, Internet & Communications Conference on August 14. CEO and CFO will participate.
news.summary: Charlotte-based Paymentus Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PAY) revealed that CEO Dushyant Sharma and CFO Sanjay Kalra will engage in an informational session at the Oppenheimer Virtual Technology, Internet & Communications Conference on August 14th. The two executives of the cloud-based bill payment solutions provider are set to participate in a fireside chat during the conference.

news.headline: PICit A/S, a logistics software leader, secures growth investment from Arcadea Group to enhance market expansion and product development. CEO Henrik Højen Andersen retains position.
news.summary: A company based in AARHUS, Denmark, and two other locations in TORONTO and ORLANDO, Fla., known as PICit A/S, which specializes in port, rail, and intermodal logistics management software, has revealed a significant strategic growth investment from Arcadea Group. Arcadea Group is a renowned permanent-hold investor in global software enterprises. This newfound partnership is geared towards maintaining robust expansion in both the domestic and international sectors, as well as expediting product enhancement. Henrik Højen Andersen, the current CEO of PICit, will persist in his position amidst these developments.

news.headline: Canopy Growth reports Q1 FY2025 financial results: $66.2M net revenue, 67% gross profit increase, 20% YoY growth in Canada medical cannabis.
news.summary: Canopy Growth Corporation has reported its financial results for the first quarter ended June 30, 2024, showing significant growth in gross profit and Canada's medical cannabis segment. The company achieved a 67% increase in gross profit, with a 20% increase in net revenue for Canada's medical cannabis. Operating loss improved by 47% and consolidated Adjusted EBITDA loss narrowed by 77% year-over-year. The company extended the maturity of its senior secured term loan and plans to strengthen its financial flexibility. Revenue declined by 13% to $66MM in Q1 FY2025 due to divested businesses. SG&A expenses decreased by 24% in Q1 FY2025, and operating loss improved to $29MM. Free cash flow improved by 49% to an outflow of $56MM. Canopy Growth is focusing on growth opportunities in multi-market cannabis leadership.

news.headline: EchoStar reported total revenue of $7.97 billion for the six months ended June 30, 2024, with a net loss of $312.97 million. Pay-TV subscribers decreased by 104,000, Retail Wireless by 16,000, and Broadband by 23,000 in the second quarter of 2024.
news.summary: EchoStar Corporation reported its financial results for the second quarter of 2024, showing a total revenue of $7.97 billion for the six months ending June 30, 2024, down from $8.74 billion in the same period last year. They reported a net loss of $312.97 million in the first two quarters of 2024, compared to a net income of $466.20 million last year. The company had 8.07 million Pay-TV subscribers, 7.28 million Retail Wireless subscribers, and 955,000 Broadband subscribers by the end of the quarter. EchoStar also revealed figures for segment results, showing revenue and OIBDA data for different sectors within the company. This financial update was shared by Hamid Akhavan, the president and CEO of EchoStar Corporation.

news.headline: Soligenix reported $9.1M cash at June 30, 2024. Achieved three-fold higher response rate with HyBryte™ in CTCL treatment.
news.summary: Soligenix, Inc. announced its recent financial results, with approximately $9.1 million in cash as of June 30, 2024, excluding $4.1 million from recent warrant exercises. The company is focusing on developing products for rare diseases, notably HyBryte™ for cutaneous T-cell lymphoma (CTCL) and SGX945 for Behçet's disease. Positive clinical results showed a three-fold higher response rate for HyBryte™ compared to Valchlor® in treating CTCL, while an ongoing study is examining extended HyBryte™ treatment. Soligenix also regained compliance with the Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Rule, securing the listing of its common stock. The company is keen on creating long-term shareholder value, possibly through partnerships and merger opportunities.

news.headline: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. reports $474.9M Net Utility Sales, $2.5B sale with LS Power, reducing dividend & capex.
news.summary: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. announced its financial results for the second quarter of 2024, focusing on its strategic transition to a pure-play regulated utility. The company reported:- Net Utility Sales of $474.9 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $311.0 million for the second quarter.- Adjusted Net Earnings of $65.2 million and Adjusted Net Earnings per common share of $0.09, showing year-over-year increases.- Revenue of $598.6 million for the second quarter with a 5% decrease from the previous year.- The Regulated Services Group saw a 6% increase in Divisional Operating Profit.- The Renewable Energy Group recorded a 33% growth in Divisional Operating Profit.- The company entered agreements to sell its renewable energy business for up to $2.5 billion in cash and support the sale of Atlantica shares.- AQN reduced its dividend and planned to lower capital expenditures while focusing on customer service improvements.

news.headline: Monopar Therapeutics reports Q2 2024 results, starts MNPR-101-Zr Phase 1 trial, MNPR-101-RIT trial on track for Q4; stock split approved.
news.summary: Monopar Therapeutics Inc. announced the initiation of the MNPR-101-Zr Phase 1 clinical trial for cancer imaging and treatment, with promising preclinical studies showing tumor uptake in various cancers. The MNPR-101-RIT therapeutic trial is set to start in Q4 2024, with preclinical studies demonstrating tumor elimination in uPAR-expressing cancers. The company's MNPR-101-RIT abstract was selected for a top-rated presentation at a major conference in Germany. Monopar also secured a supply agreement for actinium-225 and gained full ownership of its radiopharmaceutical platform. Additionally, a reverse stock split was approved to boost compliance with Nasdaq listing requirements.

news.headline: Spectral Medical (TSX:EDT) strong Q2 with 126 Tigris trial patients enrolled out of 150 target. $11M funding secured to complete trial.
news.summary: Spectral Medical Inc. has enrolled 126 out of 150 patients for its Tigris trial seeking FDA approval for septic shock treatment. The company experienced accelerated enrollment in Q2 2024, with 45 patients enrolled, highest since trial start. Revenue increased to $471,000 for Q2 2024 from $306,000 in the same period last year. Operating expenses rose to $4,873,000 for Q2 2024, with a loss of $4,402,000. The company ended Q2 2024 with $7,536,000 cash and 281,245,539 common shares outstanding. Additionally, Spectral secured funding with $11 million in funds to complete Tigris trial enrollment. Baxter partnership for PMX commercialization and $6,232 in convertible notes were received, with further funding sources explored. The company appointed a new Board member and changed auditors during this period. Spectral plans to complete Tigris trial by late 2024, leading to potential FDA submission and approval.

news.headline: Algonquin Power & Utilities selling renewable energy business to LS Power for up to $2.5 billion, focuses on regulated utility.
news.summary: A recent transaction has unlocked the value of AQN as a pure-play regulated utility. The proceeds from this transaction are anticipated to recapitalize the balance sheet of the company and position it for future growth. AQN will be hosting its second-quarter earnings conference call at 8:30 am E.T. on August 9, 2024. This strategic move in OAKVILLE, ON is expected to set the company on a positive trajectory for future development and success.

news.headline: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp reported its 2024 second quarter financial results, transitioning to a regulated utility company. Holding an earnings conference call at 8:30 am ET. Stock symbols: TSX: AQN, NYSE: AQN.
news.summary: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (TSX: AQN) (NYSE: AQN) is continuing its strategic shift towards becoming a fully regulated utility company. The company will be holding its second-quarter earnings conference call at 8:30 am E.T on August 9, 2024. This move aligns with their goal to focus solely on regulated utilities.

news.headline: Mecpow unveils X4 series laser engravers, MP-30 mug press, MP-3881 heat press, and MIG-120 tools.
news.summary: A leading provider of innovative crafting solutions, Mecpow, has unveiled the X4 series laser engraving machines in Berlin on August 9, 2024. These machines meet European IEC Class 1 and US FDA Class 1 safety standards. In addition, Mecpow also launched the MP-30 mug press, the MP-3881 heat press, and the MIG-120.

news.headline: Curaleaf opens new dispensary in Pensacola, Florida, bringing total to 63 in state and 149 nationwide.
news.summary: Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. has recently opened a new store in northwest Florida, boosting its total number of dispensaries in the state to 63. Nationally, this brings the Company's retail presence to a total of 149 dispensaries. Headquartered in Stamford, Conn., Curaleaf is recognized as a prominent global provider in the cannabis industry. The company's listings on the stock market include TSX: CURA and OTCQX: CURLF.

news.headline: Lightspeed partners with US Foods®, enhancing operations for foodservice operators. Press release issued on Aug 9, 2024.
news.summary: Assisting in enhancing business triumph among US Foods' group of foodservice operators, Lightspeed Commerce Inc. (NYSE: LSPD) (TSX: LSPD), based in Montreal, announced on August 9, 2024, its continuous commitment to being the comprehensive commerce platform that enables merchants to deliver top-notch omnichannel experiences.

news.headline: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. declares Q3 2024 common share dividend of US$0.0650 (C$0.0893) and Q3 2024 preferred share dividends.
news.summary: In Oakville, ON, on August 9, 2024, Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (AQN) disclosed the declaration of common and preferred share dividends by its board of directors. The dividends include US$0.0650 per common share, with tickers on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) being AQN, AQN.PR.A, and AQN.PR.D, and on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) as AQN.

news.headline: Kamux's Chief People and Sustainability Officer Marjo Nurmi leaves to become an entrepreneur; announced on Aug 9, 2024.
news.summary: On August 9, 2024, in Hämeenlinna, Finland, Kamux Corporation announced in a Stock Exchange Release that Marjo Nurmi, the Chief People and Sustainability Officer, as well as a member of the Group Management Team, has chosen to venture into entrepreneurship. This decision will lead to Nurmi's departure from Kamux.

news.headline: Leatt Corp reports Q2 2024 results. OTQB: LEAT. Leading developer of protective gear for Moto, MTB & other sports.
news.summary: In Cape Town, South Africa on August 9, 2024, Leatt Corporation (OTCQB: LEAT), renowned for producing protective gear for various extreme sports, disclosed their financial performance for the quarter ending.

news.headline: VolitionRx prices $21.5M offering, $7M upfront with potential $14.5M. Multi-national company.
news.summary: HENDERSON, Nev., August 9, 2024 - VolitionRx Limited (NYSE AMERICAN: VNRX) has received an initial payment of $7 million, with the potential for an additional $14.5 million in total gross proceeds upon the full exercise of milestone-linked warrants. The company is a multinational entity.

news.headline: Glue Up partners with Cvent for community engagement, with AI membership solutions. MCLEAN, Va., Aug. 9, 2024.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia on August 9, 2024, Glue Up, a top provider of AI-driven comprehensive membership management solutions, has proudly announced a strategic partnership with Cvent. Through this partnership, Glue Up solidifies its position as a frontrunner in utilizing cutting-edge technology to advance their offerings.

news.headline: Precigen will release Q2 and H1 2024 financial results on August 14. Nasdaq: PGEN. Biopharmaceutical company.
news.summary: In Germantown, Maryland on August 9, 2024, Precigen, Inc., traded as PGEN on Nasdaq, a biopharmaceutical company focusing on advanced gene and cell therapies for enhancing patient well-being, stated they would be revealing their financial results for the second quarter and first half of 2024.

news.headline: Indiantown Village Council approves lease for biosolids facility; expected to create new jobs and revenue.
news.summary: A new eco-friendly facility in Indiantown, Florida, is poised to stimulate the local economy by creating green jobs and providing sustainable solutions for managing biosolids. The Village Council's recent approval of a lease marks a pivotal moment, with the facility expected to generate a significant number of jobs in the area. This development not only offers employment opportunities but also aims to boost revenue within the community. The facility is set to address the growing need for sustainable biosolids management, contributing to environmental conservation efforts in the region. The decision by the Village Council reflects a commitment to fostering economic growth while prioritizing environmentally friendly practices.

news.headline: 20th Annual World Food & Music Festival in Des Moines to feature diverse musical lineup on Aug. 23-25, 2024.
news.summary: The 2024 World Food & Music Festival, sponsored by Veridian Credit Union, has revealed its musical roster for the upcoming event in Greater Des Moines, Iowa. Set to take place from Friday, August 23 to Sunday, August 25 at Western...

news.headline: Local Bounti to release Q2 2024 financial results on Aug 13, 2024. Company ticker: LOCL. Indoor agriculture firm based in US.
news.summary: In Hamilton, Montana, on August 9th, 2024, Local Bounti Corporation (NYSE: LOCL) revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the fiscal second quarter ending on June 30, 2024. Local Bounti, a pioneering indoor agriculture company based in the U.S., is set to disclose this information prior to market opening.

news.headline: American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings reported Q2 2024 sales of $1.63 billion, and net income of $18.2 million.
news.summary: American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings, Inc. (AAM), listed on NYSE as AXL, announced its financial performance for Q2 2024. The company reported sales totaling $1.63 billion and a net income of $18.2 million in the same period.

news.headline: Chantecaille partners with Tmall, China's top online retailer, to expand presence, offering skincare products to wider audience.
news.summary: Chantecaille recently revealed its new partnership with Tmall, China's top online retail platform. This union aims to introduce the brand's high-performance botanical skincare and makeup products to a wider market, bolstering Chantecaille's reach in China. This move highlights Chantecaille's commitment to growth and accessibility, as it taps into Tmall's extensive customer base of over 800 million active users.

news.headline: Equinix's Jon Lin to speak at TD Cowen's 10th Annual Communications Conference on Aug. 9, 2024. ($EQIX)
news.summary: A company based in Redwood City, California, Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), which is known as the world's digital infrastructure company, revealed that Jon Lin, the Executive Vice President and General Manager of Data Center Services, is set to speak at TD Cowen's 10th Annual Communications event.

news.headline: GreenFirst Forest Products purchased buy-out group annuity to move $26.5M pension obligations, expecting $0.8M gain.
news.summary: In Toronto, GreenFirst Forest Products Inc. (TSX: GFP) has reported the purchase of a buy-out group annuity, shifting around $26.5 million in defined benefit pension obligations to a Canadian insurance provider. The move is part of the Company's strategic pension fund management and is anticipated to result in a net settlement gain of roughly $0.8 million by year-end. This decision reflects GreenFirst's efforts to optimize its financial position and ensure stability in its pension commitments.

news.headline: Space stocks are on track to end the week with a strong rally.
Alert: Disclosure of significant ownership stake above 5% in a company, affecting its ownership structure. #shareholding
Viant (NASDAQ: DSP) to present at upcoming investor conferences: Canaccord Genuity on Aug 14th, 2024 in Boston & Citi on Sep 6th, 2024 in NY.
news.summary: Viant Technology Inc., a prominent advertising technology company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol DSP, shared that its management team will be presenting at two investor conferences. The first presentation is set for August 14th, 2024 at 1:00 pm ET at the Canaccord Genuity 44th Annual Growth Conference in Boston, MA. The second presentation will take place at the Citi 2024 Global TMT Conference in New York, NY on September 6th, 2024 at 9:10 am ET. The presentations will be webcast live for interested parties.

news.headline: Arkadium launches third party publishing for game developers, offering access to resources including $1M through APF1 fund.
news.summary: A prominent provider of browser-based games (BBGs), Arkadium, revealed its foray into third-party publishing for game developers, marking a significant shift in its 23-year history. Since the launch of the "Arkadium for Developers" initiative in April 2024, the company has expanded its platform and distribution network. This novel publishing service aims to offer BBG developers access to various resources such as funding, marketing, and support.

news.headline: PROG Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:PRG) declares $0.12 dividend per share, payable on Sept 3, 2024, to shareholders of record by Aug 20.
news.summary: PROG Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PRG), a fintech holding company based in Salt Lake City, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per common stock share. This dividend will be payable on September 3, 2024, to shareholders recorded on August 20, 2024. The company oversees Progressive Leasing, Vive Financial, Four Technologies, and Build. PROG Holdings, Inc. operates in the financial technology sector and is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol PRG.

news.headline: Alight (NYSE: ALIT) to present at Canaccord Genuity 44th Annual Growth Conference in Boston on August 13,2024 at 9 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Alight (NYSE: ALIT), a prominent cloud-based human capital technology and services company, will have its President, Greg Goff, speaking at the Canaccord Genuity 44th Annual Growth Conference in Boston on August 13, 2024, at 9 a.m. ET. The event will be accessible through a live webcast and replay link. Alight Solutions serves numerous global organizations as a key provider in this sector.

news.headline: Proficient Auto Logistics (NASDAQ: PAL) reports Q2 2024 financial results with total operating revenue of $106.6 million.
news.summary: Proficient Auto Logistics, Inc. (NASDAQ: PAL) based in Jacksonville, Florida, disclosed its financial outcomes for the quarter ending June 30, 2024. The report encompassed Proficient Auto Logistics, Inc. (“Proficient”), Proficient Auto Transport, Inc. (“Proficient Transport”), and the five Founding Companies collectively. Notable highlights for the second quarter included a Total Operating Revenue of $106.6 million, marking an increase from the same period in 2023.
